title: phyllanthus nothisii var. alticola
intro: Phyllanthus nothisii var. alticola, a lesser-known variety of the Phyllanthus nothisii plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in some cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus nothisii var. alticola include potential anti-viral and anti-cancer properties, as well as the ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
